feature.name: XRVisibilityMaskChange
feature.creator: alcooper@chromium.org
feature.summary: Adds an XRVisibilityMaskChange event that will provide a list of vertices and a list of indices to represent the mesh of the visible portion of the user's viewport. This data can then be used to confidently limit the amount of the viewport drawn to in order to improve performance. To better support this event, XRView's are also given unique identifiers to allow easier pairing with the associated masks. This is an extension to the core WebXR specification.
